name: d2d_multi_chip_ordering
description: Across the TRI-1 triad (Phi master / Euler compute slave / Gamma neuromorphic slave), packets sent in order on a given direction (N/E/S/W) MUST be observed in the same order on γ's RX latches. Ordering is per-direction; cross-direction ordering is not asserted.
anti_claim: If any per-direction RX latch observes a permutation of the sent sequence on that direction, the implementation violates TN-D2D-05.
